epg.title: Most Weeks in UK Chart? Top 100
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Who spent the most weeks in the UK Top 75 during the whole decade? We countdown the Top 100 artists with longevity - all their song weeks combined & surprises are a guarantee!

epg.title: Shaky's Rockin' Good Hits! '81-'87
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

11 smash hits, back to back, from the UK's biggest selling singles artist of the 1980s - Shakin' Stevens! Including no.1s "Green Door", "Oh Julie" & "This Ole House".

epg.title: 1981 Unleashed!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1981!

epg.title: Top of the 80s Charts
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

4 hours of bona fide classics from the best decade of music - every one of them made UK number 1. With rock, dance, new romantic, soul, pop & more!

epg.title: Denise's 5*Star Families - Top 30!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Brothers, Sisters, Husbands, Wives - they made it a family business back in the 80s! And Denise Pearson was one of them with her siblings - in pop supergroup Five Star!

epg.title: 80s Dance Anthems Day!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Trying to impress someone with your cool moves? Give these a go, as we party through the day on NOW 80s.

epg.title: High NRG! 1984-1989
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

From Evelyn Thomas' High Energy in 1984, through Stock Aitken & Waterman & onto the breakout of happy house at the end of the decade - this massive dance session is full of bounce!

epg.title: 80s Dance Anthems Day!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Trying to impress someone with your cool moves? Give these a go, as we party through the day on NOW 80s.

epg.title: Tight Fit's 30 Fantasy Islands!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Denise, Julie & Steve with over 2 hours of salty videos full of sea, sun & sand! Time to get beach fit  with Tight Fit & NOW 80s!

epg.title: 40 Hits ... That Missed!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Not only did they miss the top 10, but these 40 famous songs never even scraped the UK top 20 first time around! From Abba to Aerosmith & Janet Jackson to Joan Armatrading.

epg.title: Fist Pumping Power Ballads!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

From the decade that invented the genre - non-stop powerful love songs, back to back.

epg.title: Complete George Michael: 1982-1989
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

A complete video retrospective of George's 80s hits - both solo & with Wham, Elton John, Aretha Franklin & that forgotten top 10 from Boogie Box High.

| +TP | Música |

He was Barry in Eastenders, Barry in Extras & now now he's Barri in Barrioke Karaoke! Shaun Williamson has 3 hours of party madness with a twist - it's 80s v 90s!

epg.title: I'll Name That Tune In One!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Only the anthems from the brightest decade of pop - the 1980s. You'll be able to recognise all these tune from their very first note!

epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

epg.title: 10 Best Selling Albums of the 80s
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

The mega-selling 80s was responsible for a mountain of timeless pop singles - but what have been the biggest selling albums released in the decade? You might be surprised at some!

epg.title: The UK Top 20 of the 80s
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Radio 1 legend Bruno Brookes returns with a countdown of the 20 biggest singles of the decade. Including million-selling hits from Frankie, Wham! & Soft Cell.

epg.title: Chart Toppers!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!

epg.title: Really? Only 1 Week At No.1?
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Amazingly, every one of these 23 top tunes only spent 7 days at the top of the UK chart during the 1980s - even big songs by superstars like Madonna, Kylie, Blondie & U2!
